language.title: Choose your language
language.description: Select the language you want to use in the app.

1.title: Welcome to Loops!
1.description: Get ready for an epic coding adventure where you build, play, and win!

2.title: Explore the Code Universe
2.description: Complete quests, solve puzzles, and level up your coding skills.

3.title: Join the Team
3.description: Become part of a huge community of young coders just like you!

completion.title: You're Ready to Go!
completion.description: Get ready to explore, build, and have fun!

goals.title: Choose your daily goals
goals.description: Pick a daily goal to power up your brain! How much time do you want to play?

levels.title: Choose your level
levels.description: How much coding do you already know? We'll match the fun to your level!

status.title: Choose your status
status.description: Tell us a bit about you! This helps us make the game more fun.

login.title: Glad to see you again!
login.invalid_provider: You cannot login with password for this account type.

google.browser_not_supported: Your browser doesn't support Google Sign-In.
google.not_configured: Google Sign-In is not properly configured.
google.sign_in_first: Please sign in to your Google account first.
google.https_required: Google Sign-In requires a secure connection (HTTPS).
google.disabled_by_user: Google Sign-In was disabled by user preference.
google.unauthorized_domain: This domain is not authorized for Google Sign-In.
google.unavailable: Google Sign-In is not available right now.

register.title: Join the adventure!

password_rules.minimum_length: Use at least 8 characters to make it strong
password_rules.uppercase: Add at least one uppercase letter

register.invalid_password: Password does not meet all requirements yet.

selector.adventure_description:
Apprends, joue et relève des défis avec ton mascotte.
Chaque étape te rapproche du niveau suivant

verify.title: Email Verification
verify.description: We've sent an activation code to your Email {{email}}
verify.dialog_description: We sent you a verification code by e-mail {{email}}:
verify.input_hint: Enter the code to activate your account and continue the adventure
verify.no_code_received: Didn't receive the code? Check your spams or resend it.
verify.important_note: Important: Your account will be disabled in 24h if you don't verify it.
verify.resend_success_desc: Please check your email for the new confirmation code.
verify.resend_error_desc: Please try again or contact support if the problem persists.

reset_password.request_description: Enter your email to receive a code
reset_password.code_description: Enter the reset code we sent to your email.
reset_password.password_description: Choose and confirm your new password to finish resetting it.
reset_password.success_description: You can now sign in with your new password.
reset_password.confirm_description: Enter the confirmation code and create your new password.
reset_password.code_hint: Enter the confirmation code sent to your email.
reset_password.no_code_received: Didn't receive the code? Check your spams or resend it.
reset_password.important_note: Important: only the latest reset code sent to your email will work.
reset_password.request_success_description: Check your email for the reset confirmation code.
reset_password.request_failed_description: Please try again in a moment.
reset_password.confirm_success_description: You can now sign in with your new password.
reset_password.confirm_failed_description: Please try again in a moment.
reset_password.email_not_found: We couldn't find an account with that email.
reset_password.user_not_found: We couldn't find an account with that email.

profile.title: Profile
profile.delete_account_error_description: Please try again in a moment.

delete_account_confirm.title: Are you sure you want to leave?
delete_account_confirm.description_line_1: Deleting your account will remove your progress and profile.
delete_account_confirm.description_line_2: If you want, tell us why you are leaving before you go.
delete_account_confirm.placeholder: Tell us why you are leaving (optional)

delete_account_farewell.title: We will miss you
delete_account_farewell.description: We are sad to see you go. Until next time.

logout_confirm.title: Just a little more effort!
logout_confirm.description_line_1: You are so close to advancing!
logout_confirm.description_line_2: If you quit now, you will lose your progress.
logout_confirm.question: Keep going?

sections.personal_subtitle: A few details to personalize your experience.
sections.location_subtitle: Used for local content, stats, and matching.
sections.learning_subtitle: Tune your pace and experience level.

errors.password_account_type_error: You cannot change password for this account type.
errors.password_changed_success: Your password has been changed successfully. Please login again.

dialog.title: Free trial limit reached
dialog.description: Your 3 free trials are over. Submit a voucher code to continue learning. Contact the admin for a code.
dialog.default_description: Enter your voucher code to unlock this category and start your learning journey!

errors.invalid_format: Please enter a valid 5-digit voucher code.

errors.completion_required: Please complete the current item before proceeding
errors.validation_failed: Navigation failed due to validation error

quiz.question: Question
quiz.time_up_message: You didn't answer in time, so this question was skipped.

certificate.title: Congratulations, you did it!
certificate.keep_going: Keep going — more wins are waiting.

expired.title: Session Expired
expired.description_line_1: Your session has expired due to inactivity or an authentication error.
expired.description_line_2: You will be redirected to the login page shortly.
